implementation_summary: Rewrote leaveGroup() in MarmotContext.tsx. Added import of LEAVE_INTENT_KIND and serialiseLeaveIntent from leaveSync.ts. The new body: (1) fetches mlsGroup via clientRef.current?.groups.get(groupId) — safe for stale-closure scenarios; (2) if mlsGroup and selfPubkeyHex are available, sends kind-13 via sendRumorSafe (handles unapplied-proposals retry internally), wrapping in try/catch so a send failure after MAX_RETRIES does not block purge; (3) fires kind-9 chat announcement as fire-and-forget via .catch(() => {}); (4) runs the existing eight-step purge sequence unconditionally. mlsGroup.leave() is never called.
